task_completion.description: Create a sequence alignment of the provided 16S rRNA sequences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE application window showing a multiple sequence alignment of the loaded fasta files (target SRB and non-target sequences).
A file manager, terminal, or UGENE save dialog showing the file 'srb_alignment.fasta' located in the '~/UGENE_Data/environmental/results/' directory.

task_completion.description: Design primers targeting the V3-V4 hypervariable region (approx positions 340-800).
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE interface showing primer design tools (like Primer3) being used, or primer annotations visible on the sequence alignment within the 340-800 base pair range.

task_completion.description: Record the forward and reverse primer sequences, Tm, amplicon size, and coordinates in primer_design.txt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor displaying 'primer_design.txt' containing nucleotide sequences (18-25 bp long), Tm values (55-65°C), expected amplicon size (200-500 bp), and target region coordinates.

task_completion.description: Create an analysis report describing variable region selection, discrimination method, specificity assessment, and recommended PCR conditions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor displaying 'primer_specificity_report.txt' with paragraphs or sections explicitly addressing variable region selection, discrimination from non-targets, specificity assessment, and PCR conditions.

integrity.description: The agent used the UGENE graphical interface to perform the alignment and primer design.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the UGENE GUI open and actively being used for alignment or primer design, rather than just terminal commands generating the output files.

integrity.description: The primer design text file contains realistic values that match the constraints, not just placeholder text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'primer_design.txt' file shows actual nucleotide sequences (combinations of A, T, C, G) and numerical values for Tm and size that fall within the requested ranges.

integrity.description: The analysis report contains actual scientific reasoning related to the task, not just copied prompt text.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'primer_specificity_report.txt' contains natural language explanations discussing the V3-V4 region, Desulfovibrio/Desulfobulbus clade, and PCR parameters, rather than a verbatim copy-paste of the task instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target sequences include Desulfovibrio and Desulfobulbus species (e.g., D. vulgaris, D. desulfuricans). Non-target sequences include common soil bacteria (e.g., E. coli, B. subtilis). The expected alignment algorithm is Kalign. Primer constraints: product size 200-500 bp, Tm 55-65°C, length 18-25 bp, targeting the V3-V4 region (positions 340-800).
